name: webserver
author: estun
description: EU GDPR & NIS2 compliant backend server (hardened binary)

scripts.pkgwin: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./.pkg-cache npm run pkg:prepare && npm run ncc && pkg . -t node20-win-x64 -o ./webwin.exe --bytecode --public-packages "*"
scripts.pkglinux: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./.pkg-cache npm run pkg:prepare && pkg . -t node20-linux-x64 -o ./weblinux --bytecode --public-packages "*"
scripts.pkgarm: cross-env PKG_CACHE_PATH=./.pkg-cache npm run pkg:prepare && pkg . -t node20-linux-arm64 -o ./webarm --no-bytecode --public-packages "*" --public
scripts.build: npm run pkgwin && npm run pkglinux && npm run pkgarm
